summary: Skild AI acquires Zebra Technologies’ robotics arm to deploy its hardware-agnostic "brain" and automate end-to-end warehouse fulfillment. The post Skild acquires Fetch Robotics assets from Zebra appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Skild acquires Fetch Robotics assets from Zebra）

title: AGIBOT在电子制造中部署半人形机器人
